schema¶

Widgets / JSON / CLI

↓

normalize_raw_config (flat → structured)

↓

StackingConfig (validation)

↓

StackingConfigResolver (rules + defaults)

↓

FINAL CONFIG (typed, stable)

↓

stack.run()

class spectraPyle.schema.schema.BootstrapConfig(**data)[source]¶

Bases: BaseModel

Bootstrap resampling configuration.

Parameters:

bootstrapping_R (int) – Number of bootstrap resamples (0–1000).

bootstrapping_R: int¶
model_config: ClassVar[ConfigDict] = {}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

class spectraPyle.schema.schema.CatalogColumnsConfig(**data)[source]¶

Bases: BaseModel

Parameters:

  • ID_column_name (str)

  • redshift_column_name (str | None)

  • metadata (MetadataColumnsConfig | None)

  • galactic_extinction_parameters (GalacticExtinctionConfig)

  • custom_normalization (CustomNormalizationColumnsConfig | None)

ID_column_name: str¶
custom_normalization: CustomNormalizationColumnsConfig | None¶
galactic_extinction_parameters: GalacticExtinctionConfig¶
metadata: MetadataColumnsConfig | None¶
model_config: ClassVar[ConfigDict] = {}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

redshift_column_name: str | None¶
class spectraPyle.schema.schema.CosmologyConfig(**data)[source]¶

Bases: BaseModel

Cosmology parameters.

Parameters:

  • cosmo_H0 (float) – Hubble constant (km/s/Mpc).

  • cosmo_Om0 (float) – Matter density parameter (0 < Om0 < 1).

cosmo_H0: float¶
cosmo_Om0: float¶
model_config: ClassVar[ConfigDict] = {}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

class spectraPyle.schema.schema.CustomNormalizationColumnsConfig(**data)[source]¶

Bases: BaseModel

Parameters:

custom_column_name (str | None)

custom_column_name: str | None¶
model_config: ClassVar[ConfigDict] = {}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

class spectraPyle.schema.schema.GalacticExtinctionConfig(**data)[source]¶

Bases: BaseModel

Parameters:

  • galactic_extinction (bool)

  • gal_ext_column_name (str | None)

gal_ext_column_name: str | None¶
galactic_extinction: bool¶
model_config: ClassVar[ConfigDict] = {}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

validate_ext()[source]¶
class spectraPyle.schema.schema.GrismIOConfig(**data)[source]¶

Bases: BaseModel

Per-grism I/O paths (directory for individual files, or combined FITS filename).

Parameters:

  • spectra_dir (Path | None)

  • spectra_datafile (str | None)

class Config[source]¶

Bases: object

frozen = True¶
model_config: ClassVar[ConfigDict] = {'frozen': True}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

spectra_datafile: str | None¶
spectra_dir: Path | None¶
class spectraPyle.schema.schema.IOConfig(**data)[source]¶

Bases: BaseModel

Input/output paths and spectra access mode.

Parameters:

  • spectra_mode ({"individual fits", "combined fits", "metadata path"}) – How individual spectra are located.

  • input_dir (Path, optional) – Directory containing the catalog file.

  • filename_in (str, optional) – Catalog filename without extension.

  • filename_in_extention ({"fits", "csv", "npz"}, optional) – Catalog file extension.

  • output_dir (Path, optional) – Directory where the stacked FITS will be written.

  • grism_io (dict[str, GrismIOConfig]) – Per-grism I/O paths keyed by grism name (e.g. "red", "blue").

  • filename_out (str) – Output filename stem. "AUTO" triggers automatic generation via build_filename().

class Config[source]¶

Bases: object

frozen = True¶
filename_in: str | None¶
filename_in_extention: Literal['fits', 'csv', 'npz'] | None¶
filename_out: str¶
grism_io: Dict[str, GrismIOConfig]¶
input_dir: Path | None¶
model_config: ClassVar[ConfigDict] = {'frozen': True}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

output_dir: Path | None¶
spectra_mode: Literal['individual fits', 'metadata path', 'combined fits']¶
class spectraPyle.schema.schema.InstrumentConfig(**data)[source]¶

Bases: BaseModel

Instrument and survey configuration.

Parameters:

  • instrument_name (str) – Instrument name (e.g. "euclid", "desi").

  • survey_name (str) – Survey/program name.

  • grisms (list[str]) – List of grism names (e.g. ["red"], ["red", "blue"]).

  • data_release (str) – Data release identifier.

  • quality (InstrumentQualityConfig, optional) – Quality filtering parameters.

data_release: str¶
grisms: List[str]¶
instrument_name: str¶
model_config: ClassVar[ConfigDict] = {}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

quality: InstrumentQualityConfig | None¶
survey_name: str¶
class spectraPyle.schema.schema.InstrumentQualityConfig(**data)[source]¶

Bases: BaseModel

Instrument-specific quality filtering parameters.

Parameters:

  • pixel_mask (list[int], optional) – Pixel bitmask bits to flag as bad.

  • n_min_dithers (int, optional) – Minimum number of dithers required for valid data.

model_config: ClassVar[ConfigDict] = {}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

n_min_dithers: int | None¶
pixel_mask: List[int] | None¶
class spectraPyle.schema.schema.MetadataColumnsConfig(**data)[source]¶

Bases: BaseModel

Parameters:

  • metadata_path_column_name (str)

  • metadata_file_column_name (str)

  • metadata_indx_column_name (str)

metadata_file_column_name: str¶
metadata_indx_column_name: str¶
metadata_path_column_name: str¶
model_config: ClassVar[ConfigDict] = {}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

class spectraPyle.schema.schema.NormalizationConfig(**data)[source]¶

Bases: BaseModel

Spectrum normalization method and parameters.

Parameters:

  • spectra_normalization ({"no_normalization", "custom", "median", "interval", "integral", "template"}) – Normalization method applied to individual spectra.

  • conservation ({"flux", "luminosity"}, optional) – Conservation mode for no_normalization.

  • lambda_norm_min (float, optional) – Lower wavelength bound for interval normalization (rest-frame Å).

  • lambda_norm_max (float, optional) – Upper wavelength bound for interval normalization (rest-frame Å).

  • interval_norm_statistics ({"mean", "median", "maximum", "minimum"}, optional) – Statistic to extract from wavelength interval.

conservation: Literal['flux', 'luminosity'] | None¶
interval_norm_statistics: Literal['mean', 'median', 'maximum', 'minimum'] | None¶
lambda_norm_max: float | None¶
lambda_norm_min: float | None¶
model_config: ClassVar[ConfigDict] = {}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

spectra_normalization: Literal['no_normalization', 'custom', 'median', 'interval', 'integral', 'template']¶
classmethod validate_lambda(v)[source]¶

Validate wavelength values are non-negative and finite.

validate_norm()[source]¶

Validate normalization configuration constraints.

class spectraPyle.schema.schema.ParallelConfig(**data)[source]¶

Bases: BaseModel

Multiprocessing configuration.

Parameters:

  • multiprocessing (bool) – Enable multiprocessing for spectrum processing.

  • max_cpu_fraction (float) – Fraction of available CPUs to use (0–1).

max_cpu_fraction: float¶
model_config: ClassVar[ConfigDict] = {}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

multiprocessing: bool¶
class spectraPyle.schema.schema.PlotConfig(**data)[source]¶

Bases: BaseModel

Output plotting configuration.

Parameters:

plot_results (bool) – Generate and display Plotly interactive plot of stacked spectrum.

model_config: ClassVar[ConfigDict] = {}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

plot_results: bool¶
class spectraPyle.schema.schema.RedshiftConfig(**data)[source]¶

Bases: BaseModel

Redshift handling and stacking reference frame.

Parameters:

  • z_type ({"rest_frame", "observed_frame", "minimum_z", "maximum_z", "median_z", "custom"}) – Type of stacking reference redshift.

  • z_value (float, optional) – Explicit redshift value when z_type = "custom".

model_config: ClassVar[ConfigDict] = {}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

requires_catalog_column()[source]¶

Check if this redshift type requires a redshift column in the catalog.

Return type:

bool

validate_redshift()[source]¶

Validate redshift configuration constraints.

z_type: Literal['rest_frame', 'observed_frame', 'minimum_z', 'maximum_z', 'median_z', 'custom']¶
z_value: float | None¶
class spectraPyle.schema.schema.ResamplingConfig(**data)[source]¶

Bases: BaseModel

Wavelength grid resampling configuration.

Parameters:

  • pixel_resampling_type ({"lambda", "log_lambda", "lambda_shifted", "none"}) – Type of wavelength grid spacing.

  • pixel_size_type ({"manual", "instrumental"}) – Whether pixel size is manually set or derived from instrument resolution.

  • pixel_resampling (float, optional) – Manual pixel size (Å) when pixel_size_type = "manual".

  • nyquist_sampling (float, optional) – Nyquist sampling factor when pixel_size_type = "instrumental".

model_config: ClassVar[ConfigDict] = {}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

nyquist_sampling: float | None¶
pixel_resampling: float | None¶
pixel_resampling_type: Literal['lambda', 'log_lambda', 'lambda_shifted', 'none']¶
pixel_size_type: Literal['manual', 'instrumental']¶
validate_pixel()[source]¶

Validate pixel resampling configuration constraints.

class spectraPyle.schema.schema.SigmaClipConfig(**data)[source]¶

Bases: BaseModel

Sigma-clipping outlier rejection configuration.

Parameters:

sigma_clipping_conditions (float) – Clipping threshold in units of standard deviation (0–10).

model_config: ClassVar[ConfigDict] = {}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

sigma_clipping_conditions: float¶
class spectraPyle.schema.schema.StackingConfig(**data)[source]¶

Bases: BaseModel

Complete validated configuration for spectrum stacking.

This is the primary configuration model used throughout the stacking pipeline. It combines instrument settings, I/O configuration, spectral processing parameters, and output options.

Parameters:

  • instrument (InstrumentConfig) – Instrument and survey selection.

  • instrument_constants (dict[str, Any], optional) – Instrument-specific constants (populated by resolver).

  • io (IOConfig) – Input catalog and output spectrum paths.

  • cosmology (CosmologyConfig) – Cosmology parameters.

  • redshift (RedshiftConfig) – Stacking redshift reference frame.

  • norm (NormalizationConfig) – Spectrum normalization method.

  • catalog_columns (CatalogColumnsConfig) – Column names in the input catalog.

  • resampling (ResamplingConfig) – Wavelength grid resampling configuration.

  • lambda_edges_rest (tuple[float, float], optional) – Rest-frame wavelength range override (Å).

  • spectrum_edges (tuple[int, int], optional) – Pixel range to include in spectrum.

  • bootstrap (BootstrapConfig) – Bootstrap resampling configuration.

  • sigmaclip (SigmaClipConfig) – Sigma-clipping configuration.

  • parallel (ParallelConfig) – Multiprocessing configuration.

  • plot (PlotConfig) – Output plot configuration.

  • log_level ({"DEBUG", "INFO", "WARNING"}) – Logging verbosity level.

  • config_version (str) – Configuration schema version.

class Config[source]¶

Bases: object

frozen = True¶
bootstrap: BootstrapConfig¶
catalog_columns: CatalogColumnsConfig¶
config_version: str¶
cosmology: CosmologyConfig¶
instrument: InstrumentConfig¶
instrument_constants: Dict[str, Any] | None¶
io: IOConfig¶
lambda_edges_rest: Tuple[float, float] | None¶
log_level: Literal['DEBUG', 'INFO', 'WARNING']¶
model_config: ClassVar[ConfigDict] = {'frozen': True}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

norm: NormalizationConfig¶
parallel: ParallelConfig¶
plot: PlotConfig¶
redshift: RedshiftConfig¶
resampling: ResamplingConfig¶
sigmaclip: SigmaClipConfig¶
spectrum_edges: Tuple[int, int] | None¶
class spectraPyle.schema.schema.StackingConfigResolver[source]¶

Bases: object

Resolver for cross-field validation and instrument-specific rules.

Applies constraints that depend on multiple fields and loads instrument rules from the instruments/instruments_rules.json file.

static resolve(cfg)[source]¶

Apply cross-field validation and instrument rules.

Parameters:

cfg (StackingConfig) – Partially validated config from Pydantic.

Returns:

Fully resolved and validated configuration.

Return type:

StackingConfig

Raises:

ValueError – If cross-field constraints or instrument rules are violated.

spectraPyle.schema.schema.compute_catalog_requirements(cfg)[source]¶
Parameters:

cfg (StackingConfig)
